generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and position sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Vehicle state data (speed, position) transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance StructuredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured data from LiDAR point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data for ISO 23247 translation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point cloud data into structured object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions per ISO 23247 standard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DigitalTwinEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity for computational offloading of ACC logic to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service providing real-time vehicle state visualization, projected driving path, detected object tracks, and data reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPath, DetectedObjectTracks, DataReporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service transferring ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionResult, SpeedCalculationResult
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service enabling ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnable, ACCDisable, SpeedSetting, EmergencyBraking
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state parameters"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on current vehicle state"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR point cloud processing"
]

instance DataReporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data reporting for troubleshooting and monitoring"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of lead vehicle detection from offloaded ACC logic"
]

instance SpeedCalculationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Speed calculation based on distance from offloaded ACC logic"
]

instance ACCEnable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSetting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate emergency braking system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TeleoperatedVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle for ADAS system testing"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles sensor/actuator data and general automotive functions including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages data processing and control mechanisms for computational offloading"
    base:contains ISO23247DataTranslationComponent
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interaction entity for monitoring and control"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationNode, ControlPanelNode
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for point cloud clustering and tracking software component"
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for ISO 23247 data translation and serialization"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanelNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for remote control commands and settings"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor actuation and steering servo are transmitted via ROS2 for intra-component communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication. The ISO 23247 Data Translation component handles serialization and unit conversions of control signals. Specific command formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, and conflict resolution mechanisms are not detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular standards but constrained by hardware limitations; this latency ensures temporal alignment between physical and digital components during real-time operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 RA with entity-based structure; Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities are each deployed on separate hardware, implemented as ROS2 packages with nodes; deviations include Physical Twin Entity's expanded scope beyond ISO 23247's OME and Data Storage component lacking a corresponding FE."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 is used for communication between software components, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the ISO 23247 standard for Digital Twin framework for manufacturing, comprising four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The Reference architecture (Part 2) defines an entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Additionally, OPC Unified Architecture is referenced as an interoperability standard for implementing Functional Entities within the architecture."
]
